The possession of the '''Bothan Needler''' hold-out weapon in a non-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] was usually grounds for arrest. They were state-of-the-art weapons 4,000 years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
